summary:
Claim: IL-1 is the most functionally significant cytokine in periapical lesions.  
Evidence: - IL-1 potently stimulates prostaglandin synthesis and osteoclast activity, driving bone resorption. - It enhances vascular permeability and recruits neutrophils, amplifying localized inflammation.  
Answer: A
